title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You hear a man talking about his morning.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: You look tired. Did you get up early? || Man: I did, but that wasn't the problem. || Woman: Was the bus late again? || Man: No, [8]I forgot my keys and had to walk back home after reaching the bus stop[/8]. By then, I was late for my first meeting. It should be fine as long as everybody remembers the new arrangement. I am glad we checked the details before making the final decision.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: You look tired. Did you get up early?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but that wasn't the problem.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Was the bus late again?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, I forgot my keys and had to walk back home after reaching the bus stop. By then, I was late for my first meeting. It should be fine as long as everybody remembers the new arrangement. I am glad we checked the details before making the final decision.

questions.question: Why was the man late?

options.A: He had to return home for his keys.

questions.explanation: The man says he forgot his keys and had to walk back home.

extracts.context: You hear two friends talking about a TV programme.
extracts.audio_script: Girl: Did you watch the programme about families living on a farm? || Boy: Yes. I thought it would be boring, but it wasn't. || Girl: What did you like? || Boy: [9]The children had to do real farm jobs, which made it funny and interesting[/9]. They weren't very good at first, but they improved quickly. That gives us enough time to prepare without changing everything else. It also means we will not have to spend extra money unnecessarily.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you watch the programme about families living on a farm?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes. I thought it would be boring, but it wasn't.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What did you like?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: The children had to do real farm jobs, which made it funny and interesting. They weren't very good at first, but they improved quickly. That gives us enough time to prepare without changing everything else. It also means we will not have to spend extra money unnecessarily.

questions.question: What did the boy like about the programme?
questions.explanation: The boy says he liked that the children had to do real farm jobs.

extracts.context: You hear two people talking in a museum.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Excuse me, is the photography exhibition upstairs? || Woman: It was last month. Now the upstairs rooms are closed for painting. || Man: Oh, I came especially to see it. || Woman: I'm sorry. [10]The photography exhibition has moved to the small gallery near the café[/10]. It's easy to find if you follow the signs. I suppose it is a small change, but it makes the situation much easier. That should make the plan easier and help everyone know what to expect.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Excuse me, is the photography exhibition upstairs?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It was last month. Now the upstairs rooms are closed for painting.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Oh, I came especially to see it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I'm sorry. The photography exhibition has moved to the small gallery near the café. It's easy to find if you follow the signs. I suppose it is a small change, but it makes the situation much easier. That should make the plan easier and help everyone know what to expect.

questions.question: Where is the photography exhibition now?
questions.explanation: The woman says the exhibition has moved to the small gallery near the café.

extracts.context: You hear two classmates talking about a new teacher.
extracts.audio_script: Boy: What do you think of our new music teacher? || Girl: She's friendly, but her lessons are very fast. || Boy: I like that we play instruments more often now. || Girl: Yes, but [11]I wish she wrote the homework clearly on the board[/11]. Last week half the class copied it down wrong. I think that is the most sensible choice after looking at the other possibilities. It means there should be fewer problems when the time comes to do it.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What do you think of our new music teacher?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: She's friendly, but her lessons are very fast.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I like that we play instruments more often now.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but I wish she wrote the homework clearly on the board. Last week half the class copied it down wrong. I think that is the most sensible choice after looking at the other possibilities. It means there should be fewer problems when the time comes to do it.

questions.question: What does the girl want the teacher to do?
questions.explanation: The girl says she wishes the teacher wrote the homework clearly on the board.

extracts.context: You hear a woman talking about buying shoes.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you find shoes for the wedding? || Woman: Yes, finally. I tried some beautiful silver ones, but they were painful. || Man: So what did you buy? || Woman: [12]I chose a simple black pair because I can wear them again for work[/12]. They were less exciting, but much more useful. I would rather decide now than leave everything until the last minute. That way, we can enjoy it more and avoid rushing around later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find shoes for the wedding?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, finally. I tried some beautiful silver ones, but they were painful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So what did you buy?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I chose a simple black pair because I can wear them again for work. They were less exciting, but much more useful. I would rather decide now than leave everything until the last minute. That way, we can enjoy it more and avoid rushing around later.

questions.question: Why did the woman choose the black shoes?
questions.explanation: The woman says she chose the black shoes because she can wear them again for work.

extracts.context: You hear a boy talking about a school club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you still going to drama club after school? || Boy: No, I changed clubs this term. || Woman: Are you doing football again? || Boy: No. [13]I've joined the school radio club because I want to learn how to interview people[/13]. We record a short programme every Friday. It is not perfect, but it seems better than the other choices we had. The important thing is to keep it simple and not make extra work.

questions.question: Which club has the boy joined?
questions.explanation: The boy says he has joined the school radio club.
